rationale: Synthetic conjecture LHS ==> (r1 == r2) is unprovable as stated. Postcondition antecedent only ties r1 and r2 to the same un_acked_messages(src@) set via map_values(@).to_set(); set equality on the abstract views does not constrain Vec<CPacket> sequence ordering (or duplicate handling), so r1@ =~= r2@ does not follow. retransmit_un_acked_packets is external_body and its only seq-level guarantee is set-equality. Tried (1) assert(r1@.map_values(@).to_set() == r2@.map_values(@).to_set()) (fails because LHS of post-implication is not in body context) and (2) assert(r1@ =~= r2@) / assert(r1 == r2) (would not follow from set equality even if LHS were available). No sound proof closes the implication without an assume().
